name: view_namespace_dashboard
prompt: Create a dashboard for the production namespace

recorded_responses.get_prometheus_query:
Query: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="production"}[5m])) by (pod)
Results (5 series):
  api-server: 0.45 cores
  worker-1: 0.82 cores
  worker-2: 0.67 cores
  redis: 0.12 cores
  nginx: 0.08 cores
